title: Fissistigma stenopetalum

This classification places it within the order Magnoliales, a group of flowering plants that also includes the magnolia family. The genus Fissistigma is a group of flowering plants native to Asia, and Fissistigma stenopetalum is one of the species within this genus. The Annonaceae family is part of the larger clade of flowering plants known as the angiosperms. Fissistigma stenopetalum's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plant species.
